notes: Dune Analytics provides SQL-queryable blockchain data. It does NOT have a built-in trader leaderboard. We use pre-built or custom queries to derive on-chain trader metrics. Used as enrichment data source.

enrichment_endpoints.notes: Execute a saved Dune query. We pre-create queries for each DEX platform.
Get results of executed query. Polling needed for large queries.

gmx_top_traders.description: Top GMX traders by realized PnL in last N days
gmx_top_traders.query_template: SELECT account, SUM(realized_pnl) as total_pnl, COUNT(*) as trades FROM gmx_v2_arbitrum.trades WHERE block_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '{days} days' GROUP BY account ORDER BY total_pnl DESC LIMIT 500

hyperliquid_trader_stats.query_template: SELECT user_address, SUM(pnl) as total_pnl FROM hyperliquid.trades WHERE block_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '{days} days' GROUP BY user_address ORDER BY total_pnl DESC

wallet_activity.query_template: SELECT address, COUNT(DISTINCT protocol) as protocols_used, SUM(value_usd) as total_volume FROM crosschain.transactions WHERE from_address = '{address}' AND block_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY address

7d.reason: Dune is not a leaderboard. Query-based enrichment only.

enrichment_use_cases: Cross-validate DEX trader PnL with on-chain data
Compute historical drawdown from trade-level data
Verify claimed performance against actual transactions

rate_limits.notes: Query execution takes 10-60s depending on complexity

cost: Free tier available. Plus: $349/mo. Enterprise: custom.
implementation_priority: Phase 4 - enrichment layer after core leaderboards work
